results.title: East West University launches foreign language centre
results.description: East West University has inaugurated its Foreign Language Centre to strengthen students' language skills, improve employment prospects, and promote global connectivity and cultural understanding. The centre was inaugurated at the university's Manzur Elahi Auditorium on Thursday, 9 July 2026, according to a press release. Ambassador of Japan to Bangladesh Saida Shinichi attended the ceremony as the chief guest. results.title: Wicklow bathing waters rated excellent as hot spell draws swimmers to coast
results.description: Wicklow’s latest bathing water results have returned excellent ratings across all listed locations, as a spell of very warm weather is expected to draw more people to the county’s beaches and swimming spots.
